---
title: "Project 1"
author: "Jon Davenport"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Pulling census data
```{r}
library(httr) 
library(tidyverse) 
#loading census data from 2022 
Census_data <- GET("https://api.census.gov/data/2022/acs/acs5/pums?get=SEX,PWGTP,MAR,SCHL,AGEP,GASP,GRPIP,JWAP,JWDP,JWMNP,FER,HHL,SCH&for=state:1&key=1981482f26afb4262ffa0044e22666650ddaa81c")

str(Census_data)

#bringing in the jsonlite package to parse 

library(jsonlite) 
parsed <- fromJSON(rawToChar(Census_data$content)) 
str(parsed)

Name_census <- as_tibble(parsed[-1, ], .name_repair = "minimal")
colnames(Name_census) <- parsed[1, ]
Name_census


Name_census_Sub <- Name_census %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
   mutate(across(c(FER, HHL, SCH, SCHL, SEX), as.factor)) %>%
  mutate(year = 2022) |>
  mutate(JWAP = mean(JWAP, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
  mutate(JWDP = mean(JWDP, na.rm = TRUE))%>%
   filter(FER == 1)%>%
  select(PWGTP, AGEP) 
 

Name_census_Sub


```
